Join our team.

Are you passionate about ethics-first investing? We would love to get to know you. 

We are currently hiring for the following positions. 

Don't see a position that suits you? We are always on the lookout for extraordinary people. Send us your CV and a cover letter. 

Financial Analyst

Do you live for data, numbers and financial analysis? We are looking for an individual with experience in extracting, analyzing and reporting on financial information. A background in financial operations, internal controls, planning and resource management, costing, financial systems or internal/external auditing would be preferred. Candidates must have some post-secondary studies in project management and elgibility for or membership in good standing in a professional accounting designation (CPA).

Investment Associate

Are you looking to build on your bachelor's degree in finance, accounting, math or a related field? Do you want to work with principals who are always looking to unlock value with an ethics-first perspective?  Apply to join our team and support ECP's principals as they evaluate opportunities across the investing spectrum. 

Legal
Counsel
